body.text: The game Slapshot gave me the best times in college, but it took away my best friend and my life. Even my girlfriend broke up with me when shit really hit the fan. I think the worst part of this whole thing has gotta be the taint of gaming. Before things really went down south, I was pretty much your normal teen living out his sophomore year at college. School was a bunch of dogshit but lacrosse kept me going. I always slept through my classes because I knew I only went so I could study business like my dad.

Normally after practice me and gf would fuck a good little but when she had to go back to school in Michigan I had to find another way to pass the time. That’s when I started getting deep into Slapshot, kind of a hockey simulating game, which is now my second favorite game of all time, second next to Super Smash Bros, where I usually play as Fox, because he’s the best. Back when Jess was still around, she would time my orgasms to my eliminations in Dolphin ranked mode. Sorry to tmi, but I was riding an 8 mile train to cloud nine, every damn day. Basically, you know I played Fox because of the better movement and tech. Without gf typically I would kickback with the lacrosse sQuad and we’d couch out by playstation with some kush. We would play 2K, smash, FIFA, you name it but nothing was as tight as my gf on sativa. That’s when my best bud on the team Alex told me about another game we could play. At that point I was all out of options and needed something better to do. We were already pretty high when he started talking about it so I didn’t have a very fast reaction time. Alex  had already tried recommending some gay stuff while we were blazed before so I was really paranoid, especially when the weed kicked in.
Yo. Time to toke up lil Jakey.
Alex passed me the bong, so I paused the show we were binging How I met your mother. I was shaking my head, what stupid shit was he gonna say this time? Stupid bitch like alex into phillipines.
These retarded games we playing aren’t doing it anymore, Alex. Counterstrike is all about aiming but no strategy and dota 2 has all strategy but no aim. I think they should make--
Alex cut me off, like he read what my mind was thinking and said
We gotta play Slapshot. I just downloaded it on Steam, it’s free to make an account, So you can’t make an excuse like last time.
Alex had tried getting me to sign up with his referral link for a hentai poker website. That’s what the reference was from.

Slapshot is an online multiplayer game where you and 5 other players play a game of hockey. The game is physics-based, so teamwork and crisp passing are essential to win. Play with your friends or team up with other players. I decided to support the developers by crowdfunding their game with my purchase of the Slappy Pass, so now I have custom skins and hidden abilities. But I’ll go easy on you because you’re new.

To be honest, Alex’s pitch was anything but hot, but after this kind of drought, I’d do anything to get my brain cells back. I was really baked, and I wasn’t about to back down. So, that’s where this all began. Just another game. I had to download it on my computer because I normally play games on consoles except for smashladder. Now I have pretty good internet from my parents but I still wasn’t expecting what happened when I had clicked on slapshot to download.
Just like that, it was downloaded.
What the fuck?

I was sitting there with Alex and his face was clearly hiding something so I turned back to the screen. I had the option to play the game on steam right there but I didn’t have a controller. Just as I turned to find one when Alex grabbed my throat
You don’t need a controller except the mouse and keyboard to play this game. It’s really simple
Oh, cool
It was all so simple then, but not long until it became anything but simple.

Without thinking twice I pressed play and launched into the game of Slapshot. First impressions were at least I liked the graphics, but I never was a fan of hockey. But I did have a few tricks up my sleeve, knowing I would playing against Alex. We kind of were even skill because we both had lacrosse experience before and lacrosse is actually not too different from hockey. But I played a lot of computer games in middle school when Alex was busy smooching boys. Haha just kidding. Fagoot.
The second thing I noticed about this game was that there was no tutorial screen. Straight to the action, the way I like it. I also never used lube with my gf.
But Alex also reminded me with a cautionary tale “Remember this is a multiplayer game, so try not to play alone.”
Whatever dude.

Alex always was scared of the dark and shit as a kid so It made a lot of sense when he said that. But it wasn’t an issue, before you know it, I started to play Slapshot with people from anywhere in the world. As a disclaimer for people interested in downloading Slapshot and giving it a test drive, you should only pick the server location thats closer to you, because latency in this game can be make or break, and if you’re lagging, you can say bye-bye to that next win. Anyway, I was kind of a noob for my first few matches and so it took me a while to figure that one out. After a while I would pull off intense goal shots and score goals and it was getting me hooked. I was thinking to not follow Alex’s advice but I still decided to. Basically the coolest move you can do in this game is called a nutmeg and it’s where you shoot the ball between the other two players on the other team and it goes between them and into the hockey net. Because I was in college, sometimes I would take shots every time I scored with a nutmeg. But like a lot of people now, when I got drunk, it just made me play for longer hours and lose self-control to stop gaming. A couple weeks ago, I was having PIV sex every day, but now I didn’t even need to smoke weed anymore, because SlapShot was honestly getting me high. But just like the JUUL if I didn’t play I would get the shakes. It started to become the main aspect of my life so like even when I’m in class, the professor would be talking about history, but my mind would be imaging new ways to nutmeg. One time, my mom called me to make sure I was safe at college and I slipped up and told her about how bad my teammates were last match. I had to use my speedboosts way too much to compensate for their shit aim and negligent playstyles. My mom was pretty much normal ‘wtf’ reaction to me talking about slapshot, so I was lucky It got swept under the rug. Maybe thinking about it now, it would have been better if my mom knew that I was playing slapshot so much, because she could have been able to save me or call the police or something when things got way outta hand. But more on that, later. This isn’t even the first layer of what slapshot became for me.

One day I was walking straight back to my computer right after practice because I would skip 7-11 or Subway on the way back to my dorm and I was itching really bad to play Slapshot, but also I was itching because I didn’t wear protective pads during my lacrosse matches anymore and was getting sloppy. I had been kicked out of my lacrosse scrim again because I had shot the ball straight between two people but it didn’t matter because I was trying to use my slapshot strategies in real life. This was the first of a lot of lessons about how the skills I would obtain from slapshot didn’t translate to real life play. It makes me show sympathy for people who go to college to be a philosopher but have to become a trashmen or boxcutter because their skills didnt have a place to score and people couldn’t understand it.

Alex unlocked my door and asked what I was doing. He could see I was playing Slapshot so he turned around to leave. But he asked me if I had played alone and that my teammate DJ was missing. DJ was more or less the Karrem Abdul Jabar of Slapshot, a total beast. He played with me because great minds think alike. DJ was the inventor of a move known as the helicopter slamdunk. It’s where you spin your character in a helicopter shape as fast as possible and your hockey stick becomes like the blade of the helicopter rotating part. This is a difficult to move control and honestly really hilarious to ensue on the opponents, but DJ could score every time. He did the helicopter slamdunk in such a way that he could control the arc of motion of the hockey object into the hockey net.
If they won’t let me play SlapShot, then I just won’t play it alone.

I started to see nothing else but Slapshot was making any sense. If I failed a test, I just saw it as the same as getting a goal scored on you in Slapshot, and so while this always sucks, you can still recover from that kind of loss. And even if you have failed a lot of test, lets say 5, if you also passed 5 tests, you have overtime and you can still do one more test to pass all of them and the fails are basically erased from your background. But that’s only the rules in SlapShot. My friend James called me as dumb as a dirt brick for thinking the tests would work like that, but James is a geek and a virgin for sure.

Geeks and virgins and losers: Alex became way too good at SlapShot and started stomping my shit daily. Not good. Especially because SlapShot is really good and I needed be the best. Alex would be doing things like school or sleeping and so I couldn’t play with him and catch up. As soon as the sun set, and as soon is it rise, I was on my PC, eyes almost bleeding from playing SlapShot tens of hours every day.The thing  is most people didn’t think I had a PC addiction problem because I used to smoke a lot and it would also give me bloodshot eyes. But after reading some stuff on reddit, I decided to try NoFap to help combat my compulsion towards SlapShot time.

I was as high as an air head when I was straight grumbling from lack of food while playing slapshot and I thought I saw something out of the corner of my eyes, it might have been not something so I decided to get some grub. Even though Quiznos was open I walked right by and didn’t look at it because I did not want to feel right about that place… When I eat there I feel like I am surrounded by homeless people and that I am in some kind of homeless people food store with terrible bread choices. Quiznos often melts their bread before they serve my cold cuts or meatballs on sandwich and don’t get me started on the music… straight up old trash inadequate cuisine. One time Quizno straight up poisoned me and my lacrosse gains when I left the store I got bad protein farts and sprayed right outside the store and it was basically their fault when I straight tagged the store window with racism graffiti. When I get peeved I get racist like my dad.
Walking straight into the Subway smell

At Subway I was still banking off an intense NoFap session and was getting all twisted with the sandwich artist. I was sweating and messing up my order like a gf with daddy issues more mayo more mayo lay it on brother. But enough sex stuff, this was around the time I started getting deep into italian meats. My favorite of all was of course the type of cured sausage consisting of fermented and air-dried meat, usually pork, known as “Salami.” I learned that salami was popular amongst southern, eastern, and central European peasants because it can be stored at room temperature for up to 40 days. The word “Salami” comes from the plural form of the Italian Salami (singular Salame.) The word originates from the word sale (salt) with a termination (ame) that in Italian indicates a collective noun. The concept of fermentation, or allowing beneficial and/or benign organisms to grow in food, has been used with meats for thousands of years. It’s clear that whoever was supplying Subway with their choice cuts has mastered the process.  Subway always serves up the realest cuts and sometimes I feel like I’m in Rome or Italy and I realize why they use to be such a powerful empire. Probably just some silly ideas, but this because I was gaming all the time. My mom used to call that gamer brain. I was doing all I could to put what I wanted on my sandwich. I often would look back at the items ON the meat trays and into the bread oven and where they would put the finished bread. I was thinking about how annoying Alex was so I grit my teeth and barked at the Sandwich Artist to put everything they had into one final shot with olives lettuce ‘matos grilled bacon bits and you know i love that papershredder thin lettuce like some kind of lubricant between the ham parts and the provolone cheese. I forgot to mention most subway have provolone cheese but this one has provolone, swiss, and gouda. Gouda is kind of like the charizard of the subway world, so I easily payed the extra half buck to go three cheese pizza  (yes, you’ve heard that saying before, because its a proven concept).Or, do you risk a disobedient flavor taste like ash and charizard. Anyways, I was just getting to the end of the sandwich line and about to get this sandwich in my mouth when the sandwich maker had to do a final inspection and cut the bread\(among other things) of the sandwich in two. Man, I hate waiting in lines, always, ever since I was a kid, after recess, we’d lineup to get some water from the kid fountain, and that’s always where i started fights and ended up in detention. But it wasn’t all shit, those were usually the kind of places where I had erotic encounters and made unique trades with classmates. At that time it was all about redbull and hot pockets. Anyway this line made me notice I wasn’t a kid anymore but that don’t mean I can’t have fun. I was concerned about all the lacrosse goals, school classes, and meals I had skipped out on to become the very best so I made up my mind to do an extra helping of italian herbs and meats on my sandwich. The sandwich maker put his hand in the bin and say they out. So he had his friends bring out a fresh tub of the stuff and as the lid was being torn off a concentrated wind of meat history hit me. My eyes began to water and my brain was swimming with thoughts of orgasming, i had to grasp the counter to stop myself from rocket nutmeging a load between the worker and the register straight onto the bread rack.

The sandwich man was asking me all kinds of questions:
“Would you like anything else on your sandwich?”

I spoke without thinking, in a daze:
“yeah , how about c um?”
I’m sorry sir we don’t have any cum. Would you be willing to provide some?

Turning my heads toward the heavens I began to black out as my senses rushed out of me and I explode of cum in my cargo pants. Say what you will, but it was the most intense E-Jac of my life, of all time. My pointed pronger literally did a 360 as weeks of NoFap re-inforced jizz sauce came out of the tip. As the ringing in my ears and dancing pills in my eyes left me I was really upset that I had embarrassed myself and swam out of the Subway Stop even without my sandwich. I was hungrier than a poverty. It would be a lie to say there was no shame in the moment, but I can’t say there was any pride. I guess I know what it means when they say gay pride now, right?

I tumbled back in to my dorm room and the reality of what I’ve done back in that subway hit me like a hockey player or a stick. I literally ruined the lives, of everyone, that was in that sad store when I had my cum explosion. And what’s more it was embarassing like being gay. I needed some sick shit to get my mind off of it… and then I remembered Slapshot. I jacked into my chair and logged onto my computer and logged onto the Slapshot servers. I knew this night was going to be bad and fucked up when I saw that there were no players in any of the servers. Not even Singapore or Japan (asian countries). My forehead began to sweat like bullets. All those warnings from that sick guy Alex swirled in my mind… “Don’t play Slapshot alone…” “Don’t play Slapshot alone…”
Fuck it.

Sometimes too I would want to do the opposite thing of what’s right just because I wanted to. This always got me in deep shit with mom and dad, but I always just say If I ain’t broke, don’t fix it.
